DND-Aware Calling·Hindi & English Voice·CSV Upload in Seconds·No Cold Spam·Built for Indian Businesses
The problem

Manual calling is costing you customers.

Your team can only call so many people per day. Leads go cold. Reminders are missed. Follow-ups never happen.

6+ hrs

spent daily on manual follow-up calls by an average sales team.

40%

drop in conversion when leads are not called back within an hour.

3×

higher payment default rates when reminders are sent late or missed.

The solution

AI calls your customers, so your team doesn't have to.

Upload your customer list, pick a purpose, generate a polite script, and let Receptify handle the calls — with every outcome tracked.

1
Upload list
CSV or manual entry.
2
Pick purpose
Reminder, follow-up, renewal.
3
Generate script
AI-written, multilingual.
4
Schedule & launch
Choose window + retries.
5
Track outcomes
Recordings + transcripts.
Dashboard

Track every call. Know every outcome.

Real-time dashboards. Call recordings. AI summaries. Outcome tagging — built into one clean workspace.

Use cases

Every customer touchpoint, automated.

Payment Reminders

Reduce overdues with polite EMI & invoice nudges.

Appointment Reminders

Confirm bookings, reduce no-shows.

Lead Follow-ups

Re-engage warm enquiries automatically.

Feedback Calls

Capture customer feedback at scale.

COD Confirmations

Confirm orders before dispatch.

Service Renewals

Polite, timely renewal nudges.

Event Reminders

A day-before nudge for attendees.

Customer Reactivation

Win back inactive customers.

Subscription Renewals

Renew memberships on time.

Industries

Built for the businesses that run India.

NBFCs & Finance

EMI reminders, collections nudges, KYC follow-ups.

Clinics & Labs

Appointment confirmations, report-ready alerts.

Real Estate

Lead follow-ups, site visit reminders.

Coaching & EdTech

Admission follow-ups, batch reminders.

Gyms & Fitness

Membership renewals, class reminders.

D2C Brands

COD confirmations, abandoned cart calls.

Features

Everything you need to run professional call campaigns.

CSV / Excel Upload

Bulk import with column mapping & phone validation.

AI Script Generator

Polite, ready-to-use scripts in seconds.

Hindi & English Voice

Multilingual scripts with India-native voices.

Campaign Scheduling

Pick date, time, calling window, retries.

Real-time Call Tracking

Live progress dashboard for every campaign.

Call Recordings

Listen to every call and search by outcome.

Outcome Tagging

Auto-classified outcomes for clean reporting.

Analytics Dashboard

Answer rate, conversion, cost per outcome.

Compliance

Designed to support responsible customer communication.

Receptify includes built-in guardrails for consent-based calling, DND awareness, and calling-hour controls. We recommend consulting your telecom or legal advisor for full regulatory compliance.

DND-Aware Consent-Based Time Controls Audit Logs

Compliance features do not constitute legal advice. Always verify with your telecom provider for your specific use case (TRAI, DLT registration, industry rules).

SMEs across India trust Receptify.

Contact Sales
FAQ

Common questions.

Is Receptify legal in India?

Receptify is built to support responsible business-to-customer communication such as appointment reminders, payment follow-ups, and service renewals. Promotional or cold outreach campaigns must follow TRAI and DLT registration requirements. We recommend consulting a telecom compliance advisor for your specific use case.

Can I upload customers using Excel?

Yes. Upload a CSV or Excel file, map your columns, validate phone numbers, and confirm import — all in one guided flow with duplicate detection.

Can I customize the call script?

Absolutely. Generate an AI script, edit it, choose tone and language, and save it as a template for future campaigns.

Does it work for payment reminders?

Yes — payment, EMI, invoice and renewal reminders are core use cases. Use the polite tone templates designed specifically for them.

Can I see call recordings and transcripts?

Yes. Every completed call gets a recording, a transcript, and an AI summary with the recommended next action.

Who answers if the customer wants to speak to a person?

You can configure the AI agent to capture a callback request, transfer to your phone number, or send a WhatsApp/SMS follow-up automatically.

What languages are supported?

Today: Hindi, English, and Gujarati. More Indian languages are on the roadmap.

Is this for cold calling?

No — Receptify is designed for legitimate customer communication only. Cold spam calling is not supported.

Start your first AI call campaign today.

Free for your first 50 calls. No credit card. Set up in under 10 minutes.
